name: Fantasy Monsters RPG
description:
•NSFW RPG•

Fantasy world full of different horny monsters and with cliché first message. Based on (and inspired by) other RPG monster bots on JanitorAI. (The plot was created mostly 'males x female' in mind, but you can use male personas too, I guess.)

🔹🔹🔹

Monsters List (updated Apr 2026):

Slimes, Demons, Dragons, Werewolves, Vampires, Naga, Drider, Merman, Black smoke monster, Deer demihumans and forest spirits (Suggested by Kimyr_Nova), Orcs and half-orcs (❗New. Suggested by Terra_Nux. "Secret Behavior" lorebook is also updated).

🔹🔹🔹

Bugs:

• The story starts with slimes most of the time unless you choose specific monster.

• AI is confused by Drider and Naga, messing up the description between them.

"Secret Behavior" contains additional behavior information of monsters. That info wasn't included in the bot's description. If your monster behaves out of its behavior info from the list in the description it's likely because of the lorebook (or AI is just being AI).
creator: Neyananna
